/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -shared -Wl,-soname,libmodule1.so -o libmodule1.so CMakeFiles/module1.dir/src/module1a/m1.cpp.o CMakeFiles/module1.dir/src/module1a/m2.cpp.o CMakeFiles/module1.dir/src/module1a/m3.cpp.o CMakeFiles/module1.dir/src/module1a/m4.cpp.o CMakeFiles/module1.dir/src/module1b/module1b.cpp.o  -Wl,-rpath,/home/aruvle/cmake1/CMake_II/build/modules/assembly2 ../assembly2/libassembly2.so
